title: Account session-generation foundation
summary: JWT session과 auth identity epoch에 결합된 account generation, cutover fence/Hook/staging/quarantine/auth outbox를 additive dark-ship하고 #3 joint activation 전 production legacy authority를 유지한다.
goal: 탈퇴 전 세션 또는 UUID-only bootstrap이 동일 UUID의 새 계정 세대에 개인 데이터를 쓰지 못하도록 하면서, 기존 production 동작은 legacy 상태에서 그대로 보존한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for authoring, repair, implementation, review, security, authority, or closeout
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, design author/critic, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final over all five core plus two design gate artifacts, backend implementation, security/DB review, five-axis review, frontend implementation, screenshot design authority, and final closeout; no session approves its own work

external_smokes: remote exact-principal Hook ACL and legacy allow smoke with supabase_auth_admin
remote personal-writer and auth.users inbound-FK inventory completeness
deployed DELETE /api/v1/users/me legacy compatibility smoke without destructive production account deletion
deployed POST /api/v1/users/me/cutover-quarantine-resolution unauthorized and legacy non-exposure smoke

evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of five core plus two design gate artifacts
separate Codex ACCOUNT_QUARANTINE design authority review

out_of_scope: Production cutover_maintenance entry or generation_active promote in F0 alone
Canonical lifecycle/watermark production backfill before the slice 3 joint gate
Recipe image registry, storage deletion outbox, direct Storage revoke, and browser remove replacement owned by recipe-visibility-read-hardening
Legacy image visibility copy/swap or orphan deletion
Actual MacBook launchd install or production secret injection
MYPAGE redesign beyond the minimal ACCOUNT_QUARANTINE lifecycle interstitial
Meal log, cooked batch, personal recipe, or snapshot-v2 feature activation
notes: Stage 1 core is authored by a dedicated Codex documentation session and ACCOUNT_QUARANTINE wireframe/critique by separate Codex design sessions under the user's no-Claude override. The design critique Round 4 final passed with unresolved Blocker/Major/Minor 0/0/0; screenshot authority remains a future Stage 4 gate. Approval remains not_started until a separate Codex internal 1.5 reviewer passes all five core plus two design gate artifacts together. F0 completion is additive dark ship only: production state=legacy, canonical lifecycle/watermark rows=0, and joint account-generation/image activation is forbidden until recipe-visibility-read-hardening (#3) is prepared. F0-specific Vitest/PostgreSQL/remote-verifier/scheduler entries are planned Stage 2/4 artifacts locked by this Stage 1 contract, not commands claimed executable in the docs PR; Stage 2 must add them TDD-first and missing artifacts fail closed. The Stage 1 author must not commit, push, open a PR, merge, or approve its own work.
